REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. CITY IS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT AND PLAINTIFF'S THEORIES ATTEMPTING TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CITY IS A PARTY ARE NOT SUPPORTED BY LAW OR FACT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO INDICATE WHAT FACTS MAY BE ALLEGED TO SHOW THAT THE CITY IS A PARTY TO THE ACTION. TO THE EXTENT PLAINTIFF IS SEEKING A LEAVE TO AMEND (18 LINES ON PAGE 11) TO ADD NEW CAUSES OF ACTION, THE COURT WILL NOT RULE ON THAT REQUEST MADE IN OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A PROPERTY MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501), CLERK: N.
